driver_subject: iio:adc:stm32*: Use pm[_sleep]_ptr() etc to avoid need to make pm __maybe_unused
kernel_subject: PM: core: Add new *_PM_OPS macros, deprecate old ones
stage1_reason: Both commits explicitly replace deprecated OF-specific APIs with generic device property APIs and update power management macros to new kernel conventions.
stage2_reason: Driver commit ade59a7af270 uses pm_sleep_ptr() and references new PM macros; kernel commit 1a3c7bb08826 introduces DEFINE_SIMPLE_DEV_PM_OPS, deprecates old SIMPLE_DEV_PM_OPS, and adds pm_sleep_ptr usage pattern, directly enabling the driver update.
